raw_entries.text: Match ends, Netherlands 2, Japan 2.
Second Half ends, Netherlands 2, Japan 2.
Attempt missed. Teun Koopmeiners (Netherlands) header from the left side of the six yard box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries with a cross.
Junya Ito (Japan) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Micky van de Ven (Netherlands).
Micky van de Ven (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match (Netherlands).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.
Goal! Netherlands 2, Japan 2. Daichi Kamada (Japan) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Koki Ogawa following a corner.
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Denzel Dumfries.
Attempt blocked. Koki Ogawa (Japan) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Junya Ito with a cross.
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Micky van de Ven.
Takehiro Tomiyasu (Japan) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Teun Koopmeiners (Netherlands).
Substitution, Netherlands. Brian Brobbey replaces Cody Gakpo.
Substitution, Japan. Kento Shiogai replaces Ayase Ueda.
Foul by Takehiro Tomiyasu (Japan).
Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Shogo Taniguchi (Japan) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Memphis Depay (Netherlands).
Memphis Depay (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Netherlands. Nathan Aké replaces Ryan Gravenberch.
Attempt saved. Yukinari Sugawara (Japan) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Junya Ito.
Attempt missed. Koki Ogawa (Japan) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Yukinari Sugawara with a cross.
Attempt blocked. Teun Koopmeiners (Netherlands) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Quinten Timber.
Substitution, Japan. Yukinari Sugawara replaces Ritsu Doan.
Substitution, Japan. Takehiro Tomiyasu replaces Tsuyoshi Watanabe.
Substitution, Japan. Koki Ogawa replaces Takefusa Kubo because of an injury.
Attempt missed. Keito Nakamura (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Junya Ito with a cross following a corner.
Attempt saved. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Frenkie de Jong.
Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Zion Suzuki.
Attempt saved. Jan Paul van Hecke (Netherlands) header from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the top right corner by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Memphis Depay with a cross.
Delay in match because of an injury Takefusa Kubo (Japan).
Substitution, Netherlands. Memphis Depay replaces Donyell Malen.
Substitution, Netherlands. Teun Koopmeiners replaces Crysencio Summerville.
Substitution, Netherlands. Quinten Timber replaces Tijjani Reijnders.
Attempt missed. Takefusa Kubo (Japan) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Ayase Ueda.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Offside, Netherlands. Cody Gakpo is caught offside.
Substitution, Japan. Junya Ito replaces Daizen Maeda.
Foul by Ayase Ueda (Japan).
Jan Paul van Hecke (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Goal! Netherlands 2, Japan 1. Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ryan Gravenberch.
Foul by Takefusa Kubo (Japan).
Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Tsuyoshi Watanabe (Japan) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands).
Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Ayase Ueda.
Goal! Netherlands 1, Japan 1. Keito Nakamura (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Takefusa Kubo.
Goal! Netherlands 1, Japan 0. Virgil van Dijk (Netherlands) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ryan Gravenberch with a cross following a set piece situation.
Foul by Ritsu Doan (Japan).
Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Second Half begins Netherlands 0, Japan 0.
First Half ends, Netherlands 0, Japan 0.
Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Keito Nakamura.
Foul by Hiroki Ito (Japan).
Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Ayase Ueda (Japan) right footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Daichi Kamada with a through ball.
Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.
Takefusa Kubo (Japan) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands).
Attempt missed. Keito Nakamura (Japan) right footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Tsuyoshi Watanabe with a cross.
Attempt missed. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries following a set piece situation.
Handball by Keito Nakamura (Japan).
Attempt saved. Donyell Malen (Netherlands) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Tijjani Reijnders with a cross.
Attempt missed. Micky van de Ven (Netherlands) header from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Tijjani Reijnders with a cross following a corner.
Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Shogo Taniguchi.
Attempt missed. Hiroki Ito (Japan) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Keito Nakamura.
Foul by Keito Nakamura (Japan).
Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Ayase Ueda (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Keito Nakamura (Japan) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt saved. Donyell Malen (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Cody Gakpo.
First Half begins.
Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
